page_content:
Prerequisite: DATA603 or MSML603.

Cross-listed with: MSML612.

Credit Only Granted for: DATA612 or MSML612.

DATA640 Computer Vision (3 Credits)

An introduction to basic concepts and techniques in computer vision. Topics include low-level operations such as image filtering, correlation, edge detection and Fourier analysis. Image segmentation, texture

and color analysis. Perspective, cameras and 3D reconstruction of scenes using stereo and structure from motion. Deep learning for object detection, recognition and classification in images and video. Prerequisite: BIOI|603, DATA603, or MSML603.

Cross-listed with: MSML640.

Credit Only Granted for. MSML640 or DATA640.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
